channel.title: Prompt-Engineering on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Prompt-Engineering on Arrans github.io

item.title: f/prompts.chat
item.description: f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT Prompts. Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community. Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy.

item.title: microsoft/generative-ai-for-beginners
item.description: 21 Lessons, Get Started Building with Generative AI

item.title: promptslab/Awesome-Prompt-Engineering
item.description: This repository contains a hand-curated resources for Prompt Engineering with a focus on Generative Pre-trained Transformer (GPT), ChatGPT, PaLM etc

item.title: kekePower/museweb
item.description: MuseWeb is a Prompt Driven AI WebServer
